title: ivesia lycopodioides subsp. scandularis
intro: Ivesia lycopodioides subsp. scandularis is a lesser-known subspecies of the Ivesia lycopodioides plant, a flowering plant in the rose family native to western North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are brewed from the dried flowers, leaves, or roots, to harness its medicinal properties.
